violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned adequately. -Clean in place equipment cabinets, doors, handles and other pieces of equipment in the kitchen are dirty and greasy.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration * . - Sanitizer bucket that supplies the dishwasher was empty.--Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. - Dishwasher not being maintained and checked frequently for sanitizer concentration.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Walls and floors in the kitchen dirty and caked with grease
